underlying_goal: Set up Claude skills from a Xiaohongshu link, organize them by category, and sync settings to GitHub with appropriate permissions
friction_detail: Some git clone operations failed due to external repository issues, but Claude worked around them by trying alternative sources.
brief_summary: User wanted to download skills from Xiaohongshu, organize them into code/financial/study/life categories, and push settings to GitHub with allowed commands - all tasks completed successfully.
